build.note: Also serves as typecheck — no compilation errors

test.command: DEVELOPER_DIR=/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer xcodebuild test -scheme Focus -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 17 Pro' -only-testing FocusTests -parallel-testing-enabled NO CODE_SIGN_IDENTITY='' CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO
test.note: 371 tests in 37 suites passed. Timer-based test suites caused individual test timeouts (22s each) and runner restarts, but all tests ultimately passed with 0 failures. This is the known timer-hang behavior documented in testing-patterns.md.

lint.command: N/A — no lint command configured in services.yaml
lint.note: No lint command is configured. Build (typecheck) passes cleanly.

appliedUpdates.description: Extended 'VStack/HStack .accessibilityIdentifier Overrides Children' section to also mention NavigationStack as an affected container type. Added note that elements inside NavigationStack should be searched by label text rather than accessibility identifier.

Added new section 'Full FocusTests Suite Times Out (>600s) — Run Suites Individually' documenting the timeout behavior, root cause (timer-based suites), and workarounds using -only-testing/-skip-testing flags.

Added new section 'FocusCore Sources Auto-Discovered; Test Files Require Manual pbxproj Registration' documenting the distinction between SPM auto-discovery for source files vs. manual Xcode project registration for test files.

Added 'Simulator Selection for UI Tests' section documenting that the primary iPhone 17 Pro simulator (03BD412B) consistently fails UI tests with AX notification timeouts; recommend using iPhone 17 Pro Fresh instead.

Added 'Analytics Architecture Notes' section documenting (1) AnalyticsAggregator @ModelActor exists but is not wired to production UI, and (2) the correct active-days denominator for WeeklyAverageCalculator/MonthlyAverageCalculator despite incorrect docstrings.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add 'Analytics Business Logic Convention': weekly and monthly averages always divide by active days (days with at least one session), NOT by calendar days (7 or month length). Evidence: MonthlyAverageCalculator and WeeklyAverageCalculator docstrings incorrectly describe calendar-days division; the convention is only documented in VAL-CROSS-012 but not surfaced to workers. Future workers extending analytics could reintroduce a calendar-days divisor.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: analytics-averages-filtering reviewer: 'The denominator for monthly averages is active days, not calendar days. This is documented in VAL-CROSS-012 but not in AGENTS.md.' analytics-charts-performance reviewer confirmed same docstring inconsistency in WeeklyAverageCalculator.swift line 13 and MonthlyAverageCalculator.swift line 13.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add note to the TDD step (step 3) that for net-new services with no existing stubs or compilation-compatible interfaces, implementation and tests may be created together (implementation-first is acceptable when running empty tests would require stub code that mirrors the implementation). Require that tests are run and pass before the feature is considered complete. Evidence: 2 of 4 analytics workers created implementation files before test files and reported followedProcedure: true, indicating the skill as written is difficult to follow strictly for fully-new services.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: analytics-averages-filtering reviewer: 'Transcript shows all three implementation files created before test file. handoff.skillFeedback.followedProcedure is true but deviations is empty — inconsistent.' analytics-trends-categories reviewer: same pattern observed (4 service files created, then test file, then one test failure fixed). Flagged by both as potentially systemic.

rejectedObservations.observation: CategoryAggregator groups sessions by focus mode name (not app-level ScreenTimeEntry) — ambiguity in feature description about FamilyActivityPicker selections
rejectedObservations.reason: Reasonable implementation of an ambiguous spec. Validation contract (VAL-STATS-007) is satisfied. The implementation is documented in the review non-blocking issues. Not worth adding to shared knowledge.

rejectedObservations.observation: ModeTypeBreakdown.computeWithAllModes always includes 'Deep Focus' entry even when not in allModeNames
rejectedObservations.reason: Captured as non-blocking code quality issue in review. Behavior is tested and correct. Not systemic enough for shared guidance.

rejectedObservations.observation: WeeklyAverageCalculator docstring says 'Full week: divide by 7' but implementation uses active days
rejectedObservations.reason: Captured in architecture.md update (active-days denominator) and in non-blocking review issues. The docstring inconsistency is local to the file and can be addressed in the code directly if needed.
